questions.title: What is the primary authentication method?
questions.body: Based on the document's description of the authentication layer, explain which method is used and why it was chosen over alternatives.
questions.source_passage: The system uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE flow for all client applications, providing secure token exchange without exposing client secrets.

questions.title: How are database migrations handled?
questions.body: Describe the process for applying and rolling back database schema changes in the production environment.
questions.source_passage: Alembic manages all schema migrations with a linear revision history. Each migration includes both upgrade and downgrade functions.

document_summary: Technical architecture document covering authentication, database management, and deployment patterns for a microservices platform.
